opportunities.why_this_fits: BRYAN FOUNDATION INC CO FIRST CITIZENS has a track record of supporting organizations like Arborbrook Christian Academy. As a NC-based foundation with 100% in-state giving, they prioritize local organizations. Notably, UNIVERSITY OF MOUNT OLIVE received $100,000 in 2023 for: SCHOLARSHIPS FOR STUDENTS Their giving has been increasing, suggesting capacity for new grantees. **Note:** Verify application process before outreach.
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Frame your request around a specific program or initiative, as this foundation favors program-specific grants (97%). Consider requesting $28,000 - $52,500 based on their $35,000 median grant. Emphasize your local NC presence and community impact. With a 67% repeat funding rate, plan for multi-year relationship building.
